title: Telecommunications in São Tomé and Príncipe
content: Telephone s - main lines in use: 3,000 (1995) Telephones - mobile cellular: available, working more accurately than landlines Telephone system: <br "domestic:" minimal system <br "international:" satellite earth station - 1 Intelsat (Atlantic Ocean) Radio broadcast stations: AM 2, FM 4, shortwave 0 (1998) Radios: 38,000 (1997) Television broadcast stations: 2 (1997) Televisions: 23,000 (1997) Internet Service Provider s (ISPs): available, dial-up low quality, "broad band" (128/256) very expensive Country code (Top level domain): .st
